name: LLaMA 2
training_approach: pretraining on 2T tokens + RLHF for chat variants
lineage_path: McCulloch-Pitts neuron -> Perceptron -> MLP -> RNN -> LSTM -> Seq2Seq -> Transformer -> LLaMA -> LLaMA 2
summary: LLaMA 2 was Meta's first officially open-source large language model with a permissive commercial license, trained on 2T tokens with RLHF-aligned chat variants. It introduced grouped-query attention for efficient inference and became the foundation for a vast ecosystem of finetuned and derivative models, establishing the standard for open-weight LLMs.
